name: vnc_screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of the remote desktop. Returns a JPEG image encoded as base64. Use this to see what is currently displayed on the screen.

endpoint.description: Endpoint ID to capture from. If omitted, uses the default endpoint.

delay.description: Milliseconds to wait before capturing, allowing the screen to settle after prior actions. Default: 0.

name: vnc_click
description: Click at a specific screen position. Supports left, right, and middle mouse buttons, and double-click.

name: vnc_type_text
description: Type a string of text on the remote desktop using direct keysym events. Each character is sent as its exact Unicode keysym — no shift-key workarounds needed. For special characters that may not work reliably, use vnc_paste_text instead.

name: vnc_key_press
description: Press a key or key combination (e.g., 'Return', 'ctrl+c', 'alt+F4', 'shift+a'). Key names follow X11 keysym names.

name: vnc_move_mouse
description: Move the mouse cursor to a position without clicking.

name: vnc_drag
description: Click and drag from one position to another. Holds the left mouse button down during the move.

name: vnc_clipboard_set
description: Send text to the remote clipboard via VNC ClientCutText.

text.description: Text to place on remote clipboard

name: vnc_paste_text
description: Reliable text entry: sets the remote clipboard then sends Ctrl+V. Use this for special characters, URLs, or any text that vnc_type_text might mangle.

name: vnc_list_endpoints
description: List all registered VNC endpoints with their descriptions and connection status.

name: vnc_cursor_position
description: Get the current mouse cursor position on the remote desktop. Requires the vnc-helper agent running on the target machine.

name: vnc_window_list
description: List all visible windows on the remote desktop with their titles, positions, sizes, and process IDs. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_active_window
description: Get information about the currently focused window on the remote desktop including title, class, position, size, and PID. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_run_command
description: Execute a command on the remote Windows machine and return stdout, stderr, and exit code. The command is passed to cmd.exe /c. Requires the vnc-helper agent. Use this for operations that don't need GUI interaction.

name: vnc_screen_info
description: Get screen information including monitor layout, resolution, and DPI from the remote desktop. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_upload_file
description: Upload a file from the local machine to the remote desktop. Reads the local file, base64-encodes it, and sends to the helper agent which writes it to the specified remote path. Max 10MB. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

local_path.description: Absolute path to the file on the local (FreeBSD/Linux) machine

remote_path.description: Absolute path where the file should be written on the remote (Windows) machine

name: vnc_download_file
description: Download a file from the remote desktop to the local machine. The helper agent reads the remote file, base64-encodes it, and the MCP server saves it locally. Max 10MB. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

remote_path.description: Absolute path to the file on the remote (Windows) machine

local_path.description: Absolute path where the file should be saved on the local (FreeBSD/Linux) machine
